text: Alah's Messenger (&) made a small room in the month of Ramadan (Seid said, "I think that Zaid bin Thabit said that it was made of a mat') and he prayed there for a few nights, and so some of his ‘Gompanions prayed behind him. When he came to know about i, he kept on sitting. In the morming, he went out to them and said, °I have seen and understood what you did. You should pray in your houses, for the best prayer of a person is that which he prays in his house ‘except the compulsory prayers.* fn—— : Sahih al-Bukhari 731
